parsed.summary: This commit is a low-risk change: it renames the npm scope, adds an interactive menu to the /glm:setup command when already configured, updates the CHANGELOG, and revises release_card.md. There are no auth boundaries, data mutations, state changes, or runtime code paths — the affected files are static config (package.json, plugin manifests) and Markdown documentation/commands. No material adversarial finding can be sustained.
